tasks.title: [B1] Helm chart metadata + values.yaml + .helmignore
tasks.summary: Chart skeleton: Chart.yaml (apiVersion v2, version 0.1.0, appVersion "0.1.0", kubeVersion >=1.26-0), values.yaml exposing every FR-27 key with exact ADR defaults (image, cronjob, serviceAccount, stateVolume, securityContext with UID 65532, etc.), and standard .helmignore.

tasks.title: [B2] Helm chart templates (cronjob, serviceaccount, helpers, NOTES)
tasks.summary: Templates: _helpers.tpl (5 helpers), cronjob.yaml (batch/v1 CronJob with quoted image, restartPolicy OnFailure, stateVolume-gated volumes/volumeMounts, with-gated optional blocks), serviceaccount.yaml (gated by serviceAccount.create), NOTES.txt operator UX.

tasks.title: [B3] GitHub Actions workflow: helm-publish.yml (lint + template + OCI push)
tasks.summary: GHA workflow: triggers on push/master + chart-v* tags + PR, permissions {contents:read, packages:write}, concurrency on github.ref, steps checkout/setup-helm/lint --strict/template/kubectl dry-run, login+package+push gated to push events, --password-stdin, NO --force on helm push.

tasks.title: [B4] Helm chart README + repo README append + stdlib-only chart tests
tasks.summary: Docs + tests: chart README (overview, prerequisites, 4 install examples, values table, security, uninstall, versioning), root README anchored level-2 append '## Kubernetes (Helm)', stdlib-only test file with _parse_simple_yaml + _render_simple fixture, 5 TestCases covering Chart.yaml/values.yaml/CronJob/ServiceAccount/NoForbiddenResources.
